definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">if (entity instanceof Player player) {&#10;    boolean isCrawling = player.getPersistentData().getBoolean("ssc14_is_crawling").orElse(false);&#10;    player.getPersistentData().putBoolean("ssc14_is_crawling", !isCrawling);&#10;    System.out.println("[CRAWL] Toggled: " + !isCrawling);&#10;}</field><next><block type="entity_makestopriding"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
